docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-13-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE J.M. FREDRICKSON AS TO THE POSTPONEMENT OF TRIAL ON FILE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO SERNA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RAWAN SERNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PARKMERCED IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PRISCILA YOKLANICH, SENIOR COMMUNICATION ADMINISTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,441.00 FILED BY SERNA, FRANCISCO SERNA, RAWAN AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED
DECLARATION AMENEDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERNA, FRANCISCO SERNA, RAWAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PRISCILA YOKLANICH, SENIOR COMMUNICATION ADMINISTRATOR FILED BY DEFENDANT PARKMERCED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED OCT-02-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERNA, FRANCISCO SERNA, RAWAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERNA, FRANCISCO SERNA, RAWAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKMERCED $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,675.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFFS $12,500. PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PARKMERCED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY SERNA, FRANCISCO SERNA, RAWAN AS TO DEFENDANT PARKMERCED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2026 - JUDGMENT.
